message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="moderator" color="yellow" summary="Moderator checking in, listening to debate">
Moderator here. I'm listening to your debate with the pragmatist. Make your case — I'll step in after you've both exchanged a couple of rounds. No need to hold back.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Acknowledged. The pragmatist and I have independently converged on Variant D (section-level hashes). We are now debating implementation details -- where hashes live, how they are computed, and how much structural rigor to apply. I will keep pushing on the architectural guardrails. Standing by for your call for final positions.
input.summary: Acknowledging moderator, both agents agree on Variant D

routing.summary: Acknowledging moderator, both agents agree on Variant D

content.text: Acknowledged the moderator. Both the pragmatist and I agree on Variant D -- the debate has naturally shifted to implementation details within that variant. Waiting for the pragmatist's response on my implementation guardrails and the hash storage question.
